name: google
description: Google Workspace tools: read/create Calendar events and search/send Gmail, as agent tools.

config.label: Access token
config.hint: ya29... (expires in ~1h); or fill the refresh trio below. Store as ${ENV_VAR} to keep it out of the file.

config.label: Refresh token
config.hint: minted once from the consent flow; survives access-token expiry
